commands.review_summary:
The PR threads persisted and bounded transcript session cost into `/status` and `openclaw status`, adds a conditional CLI Cost column, and updates status cost docs and tests.

PR surface: Source +37, Tests +107, Docs +5. Total +149 across 12 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a feature PR rather than a current-main bug reproduction. The earlier review blockers are source-checkable at current head, but the user-visible proof still needs to be rerun for d215821.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] No repair lane is needed right now; the contributor should refresh current-head real behavior proof, then maintainer review and CI can decide the PR.

target.title: feat(status): show session costs
target.body:
## Summary
- Use transcript `usage.cost.total` for `/status` cost when available, so the status card can show cumulative transcript-backed session cost instead of only a pricing-table estimate.
- Add a conditional `Cost` column to `openclaw status` recent session rows when at least one shown session has persisted cost.
- Update status/cost docs for the new behavior.

## Linked context
Fixes #64334.

## Real behavior proof (required for external PRs)
Behavior addressed: `/status` and `openclaw status` now surface existing session cost data.
Real environment tested: Local source checkout on macOS 26.5.1 arm64, Node 22.23.0, PR head `c39a811`, using an isolated temporary OpenClaw proof state with one synthetic session store and transcript. The proof state contained no real channel credentials, account identifiers, or user chat content.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: Created an isolated `$PROOF` home/state directory, populated one `agent:main:main` session transcript with two assistant usage entries containing `usage.cost.total` values `0.0021` and `0.0042`, generated a `/status` response for that session, then captured it through `node scripts/run-node.mjs gateway call chat.history --json --params '{"sessionKey":"agent:main:main","agentId":"main","limit":2,"maxChars":20000}'`. Ran `openclaw status` against the same isolated state as a second proof path.
Evidence after fix: Copied slash `/status` output from the isolated gateway `chat.history` response at PR head `c39a811`:

```text
🦞 OpenClaw 2026.6.8 (c39a811)
🕘 Uptime: gateway 3m 57s · system 14d 21h
🧠 Model: anthropic/claude-opus-4-6
🧮 Tokens: 45 in / 32 out · 💵 Cost: $0.0063
🧮 Context: 77/32k (0%) · 🧹 Compactions: 0
🛢️ Session: agent:main:main • updated just now
⚙️ Execution: direct · Runtime: OpenClaw Default · Think: adaptive · Fast: off
🔌 Plugins: OK
🚗 Queue: steer (depth 0)
```

Supplemental real CLI output from the same isolated state showed the `openclaw status` Sessions table with the conditional `Cost` column:

```text
Sessions
┌───────────────────────────────────┬────────┬─────────┬─────────────────┬──────────────────┬────────────────┬─────────┐
│ Key                               │ Kind   │ Age     │ Model           │ Runtime          │ Tokens         │ Cost    │
├───────────────────────────────────┼────────┼─────────┼─────────────────┼──────────────────┼────────────────┼─────────┤
│ agent:main:main                   │ direct │ unknown │ claude-opus-4-6 │ OpenClaw Default │ 45/32k (0%)    │ $0.0063 │
└───────────────────────────────────┴────────┴─────────┴─────────────────┴──────────────────┴────────────────┴─────────┘
```

Observed result after fix: Both changed user-visible status paths displayed `$0.0063`, matching the cumulative transcript usage costs `0.0021 + 0.0042` stored in the isolated session transcript. The slash `/status` output showed `Cost: $0.0063`, and the CLI table showed `Cost` as `$0.0063`.
What was not tested: Real external messaging channels were not used for this proof; the slash-status evidence was captured from the local gateway history in an isolated proof state. The full test suite was not run locally for this proof step.

## Additional verification
- `corepack pnpm docs:list`
- `corepack pnpm check:docs`
- `corepack pnpm test src/commands/status.test.ts src/commands/status.command-sections.test.ts src/commands/status.command-report-data.test.ts src/auto-reply/status.test.ts`
- `corepack pnpm test src/plugin-sdk/provider-catalog-shared.test.ts`
- `corepack pnpm format:check src/status/status-message.ts src/auto-reply/status.test.ts src/commands/status.command-sections.ts src/commands/status.command-report-data.ts src/commands/status.summary.ts src/commands/status.types.ts src/commands/status.command-sections.test.ts src/commands/status.command-report-data.test.ts src/commands/status.test-support.ts src/commands/status.test.ts`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`

## Known proof notes
- The branch was rebased onto current `origin/main`; the previous plugin-sdk CI failure in `src/plugin-sdk/provider-catalog-shared.test.ts` passes on the rebased branch.
- Global `corepack pnpm format:check` reports unrelated pre-existing formatting issues outside the touched files; the changed source files pass the scoped formatter check.
target.author: mraleko

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
